description: Client environment overview — infrastructure health, alerts, VM performance, and monitoring coverage at a glance.

panels.description: Machines sending heartbeat telemetry in the last hour. added description.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
| summarize MachinesReporting = dcount(Computer)

panels.title: Machines Reporting

panels.description: Minutes since the most recent heartbeat from any machine.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Heartbeat
| summarize LastHeartbeat = max(TimeGenerated)
| extend MinutesSinceHeartbeat = datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastHeartbeat)
| project MinutesSinceHeartbeat

panels.title: Heartbeat Freshness

panels.description: Total VMs in this subscription. Compare against Reporting VMs to spot monitoring gaps.

azureResourceGraph.query:
Resources
| where subscriptionId == ${sub:singlequote}
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| summarize VMCount = count()

panels.title: Total VMs

panels.description: VMs that exist but did NOT send a heartbeat in the last hour. Zero is the goal. Any number above zero means you have blind spots.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated >= ago(1h)
| distinct Computer
| summarize Reporting = count()

azureResourceGraph.query:
Resources
| where subscriptionId == ${sub:singlequote}
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| summarize TotalVMs = count()

panels.title: VMs Not Reporting

panels.description: VMs that exist in the subscription but have NOT sent a heartbeat in the last hour. These are your blind spots — either offline, deallocated, or missing a monitoring agent.

azureResourceGraph.query:
Resources
| where subscriptionId == ${sub:singlequote}
| where type =~ 'microsoft.compute/virtualmachines'
| extend powerState = tostring(properties.extended.instanceView.powerState.code)
| extend vmSize = tostring(properties.hardwareProfile.vmSize)
| project VMName = name, ResourceGroup = resourceGroup, Region = location, Size = vmSize, PowerState = case(
    powerState == 'PowerState/running', 'Running',
    powerState == 'PowerState/deallocated', 'Deallocated',
    powerState == 'PowerState/stopped', 'Stopped',
    coalesce(powerState, 'Unknown')
)
| order by ResourceGroup asc, VMName asc

panels.title: VM Inventory & Power State

panels.description: Active Sev0 and Sev1 alerts. Non-zero means something needs immediate attention.

azureResourceGraph.query:
AlertsManagementResources
| where subscriptionId in~ (${sub:singlequote})
| where properties.essentials.monitorCondition =~ "Fired"
| where tostring(properties.essentials.severity) in ("Sev0","Sev1")
| summarize CriticalAlerts = count()

panels.title: Critical Alerts

panels.description: Active Sev2–Sev4 alerts. Potential issues or degraded conditions.

azureResourceGraph.query:
AlertsManagementResources
| where subscriptionId in~ (${sub:singlequote})
| where properties.essentials.monitorCondition =~ "Fired"
| where tostring(properties.essentials.severity) in ("Sev2","Sev3","Sev4")
| summarize WarningAlerts = dcount(id)

panels.title: Warning Alerts

panels.description: How long the oldest active alert has been firing. If this keeps growing, alerts are being ignored. A healthy team keeps this under a few hours.

azureResourceGraph.query:
AlertsManagementResources
| where subscriptionId in~ (${sub:singlequote})
| where properties.essentials.monitorCondition =~ "Fired"
| extend StartTime = todatetime(properties.essentials.startDateTime)
| summarize OldestMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', now(), min(StartTime))
| project OldestMinutes = iff(isnull(OldestMinutes), 0, OldestMinutes)

panels.title: Oldest Open Alert

panels.description: Alerts resolved in the last

azureResourceGraph.query:
AlertsManagementResources
| where subscriptionId in~ (${sub:singlequote})
| where properties.essentials.monitorCondition =~ "Resolved"
| where todatetime(properties.essentials.lastModifiedDateTime) between ($__timeFrom() .. $__timeTo())
| summarize ResolvedAlerts = count()
//coment

panels.title: Alerts Resolved

panels.description: Currently firing alerts with severity, affected resource, and start time.

azureResourceGraph.query:
AlertsManagementResources
| where subscriptionId in~ (${sub:singlequote})
| where properties.essentials.monitorCondition =~ "Fired"
| where tostring(properties.essentials.severity) in ("Sev0","Sev1","Sev2","Sev3","Sev4")
| extend Severity = tostring(properties.essentials.severity)
| extend SeverityLabel = case(
    Severity == "Sev0", "Critical",
    Severity == "Sev1", "Error",
    Severity == "Sev2", "Warning",
    Severity == "Sev3", "Info",
    Severity == "Sev4", "Verbose",
    Severity
)
| extend
    MonitorService = tostring(properties.essentials.monitorService),
    TargetResourceType = tostring(properties.essentials.targetResourceType),
    TargetResourceName = tostring(properties.essentials.targetResourceName)
| extend AlertScope = case(
    tolower(TargetResourceType) contains "virtualmachines", "Virtual Machine",
    tolower(MonitorService) contains "servicehealth", "Service Health",
    tolower(TargetResourceType) contains "subscriptions", "Subscription",
    isempty(TargetResourceType) and tolower(MonitorService) contains "servicehealth", "Service Health",
    "Other"
)
| project
    SeverityLabel,
    Severity,
    AlertScope,
    Resource = TargetResourceName,
    Reason = tostring(properties.essentials.description),
    ResourceGroup = tostring(properties.essentials.targetResourceGroup),
    MonitorCondition = tostring(properties.essentials.monitorCondition),
    SignalType = tostring(properties.essentials.signalType),
    MonitorService,
    TargetResourceType,
    StartTime = todatetime(properties.essentials.startDateTime),
    LastModified = todatetime(properties.essentials.lastModifiedDateTime)
| order by StartTime desc

panels.title: Active Alerts Table

panels.description: Alerts resolved in the last 24hrs. Shows what was fixed, when it started and how long it took to resolve.

azureResourceGraph.query:
AlertsManagementResources
| where subscriptionId in~ (${sub:singlequote})
| where properties.essentials.monitorCondition =~ "Resolved"
| where todatetime(properties.essentials.lastModifiedDateTime) between ($__timeFrom() .. $__timeTo())
| extend Severity = tostring(properties.essentials.severity)
| extend SeverityLabel = case(
    Severity == "Sev0", "Critical",
    Severity == "Sev1", "Error",
    Severity == "Sev2", "Warning",
    Severity == "Sev3", "Info",
    Severity == "Sev4", "Verbose",
    Severity
)
| extend StartTime = todatetime(properties.essentials.startDateTime)
| extend ResolvedTime = todatetime(properties.essentials.lastModifiedDateTime)
| extend DurationMin = datetime_diff('minute', ResolvedTime, StartTime)
| extend Duration = case(
    DurationMin < 60, strcat(tostring(DurationMin), 'm'),
    DurationMin < 1440, strcat(tostring(DurationMin / 60), 'h ', tostring(DurationMin % 60), 'm'),
    strcat(tostring(DurationMin / 1440), 'd ', tostring((DurationMin % 1440) / 60), 'h')
)
| extend TargetResourceType = tostring(properties.essentials.targetResourceType)
| extend Category = case(
    tolower(TargetResourceType) contains "virtualmachines", "Virtual Machine",
    tolower(tostring(properties.essentials.monitorService)) contains "servicehealth", "Service Health",
    tolower(TargetResourceType) contains "subscriptions", "Subscription",
    "Other"
)
| project
    SeverityLabel,
    Severity,
    Category,
    Resource = tostring(properties.essentials.targetResourceName),
    Reason = tostring(properties.essentials.description),
    ResourceGroup = tostring(properties.essentials.targetResourceGroup),
    Duration,
    StartTime,
    ResolvedTime
| order by ResolvedTime desc

panels.title: Recently Resolved Alerts

panels.description: Top 10 VMs by CPU utilization.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
Perf
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time"
| where InstanceName == "_Total"
| extend ComputerId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId)
| summarize AvgCPU = round(avg(CounterValue), 1) by Computer
| top 10 by AvgCPU desc

panels.title: Top CPU

panels.description: Top 10 VMs by memory utilization.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
Perf
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use"
| summarize AvgMemory = round(avg(CounterValue), 1) by Computer
| top 10 by AvgMemory desc

panels.title: Top Memory

panels.description: Top 10 VMs by disk space used.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
Perf
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where ObjectName == "LogicalDisk"
| where CounterName == "% Free Space"
| extend UsedPct = 100.0 - CounterValue
| summarize AvgDisk = round(avg(UsedPct), 1) by Computer
| top 10 by AvgDisk desc

panels.title: Top Disk

panels.description: Top 10 VMs by network throughput.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
Perf
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where CounterName == "Bytes Total/sec"
| summarize AvgNet = round(avg(CounterValue) / 1024 / 1024, 2) by Computer
| top 10 by AvgNet desc

panels.title: Top Network

panels.description: Average CPU utilization across all monitored VMs.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Processor Time"
| where InstanceName == "_Total" or ObjectName == "Processor"
| summarize AvgCPU = avg(CounterValue) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), Computer
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: CPU %

panels.description: Average disk space used across all logical disks.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where ObjectName == "LogicalDisk"
| where CounterName == "% Free Space"
| extend UsedPct = 100.0 - CounterValue
| summarize DiskUsedPct = avg(UsedPct) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), Computer
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Disk Used %

panels.description: Average committed memory bytes in use across all VMs.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use"
| summarize AvgMemory = avg(CounterValue) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), Computer
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Memory %

panels.description: Average network throughput across all monitored machines.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Perf
| where CounterName == "Bytes Total/sec"
| summarize NetworkMBps = avg(CounterValue) / 1024 / 1024 by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), Computer
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Network

panels.description: Heartbeat signal volume over time. Drops indicate machines going offline or agents failing.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Heartbeat
| summarize Heartbeats = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m),Computer
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Heartbeat Timeline

panels.description: Error-level system events over time. Spikes here often correlate with service failures, unexpected reboots, or application crashes. Quiet is good.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
Event
| where EventLevelName == "Error"
| summarize Errors = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Error Events

panels.description: Volume of performance metrics being collected. A steady flow means monitoring is healthy. If this drops to zero, data collection is broken and every other panel on this dashboard goes blind.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
InsightsMetrics
| summarize Metrics = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
| order by TimeGenerated asc

panels.title: Monitoring Data Flow

panels.description: Detailed CPU utilization statistics per VM with percentile breakdown.

azureResourceGraph.query:
resources
| where tolower(type) contains "virtualmachines" and resourceGroup in~ ($rg) 
| project Name = tolower(name), tenantId, resourceGroup

panels.title: CPU Utilization Statistics

panels.description: Detailed memory utilization statistics per VM with percentile breakdown.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
let maxResultCount = 10;
Perf
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where CounterName == "% Committed Bytes In Use"
| extend ComputerId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId)
| summarize Average = round(avg(CounterValue), 2), Max = round(max(CounterValue), 2), P50th = round(percentile(CounterValue, 50), 2), P90th = round(percentile(CounterValue, 90), 2), P95th = round(percentile(CounterValue, 95), 2) by ComputerId, Computer, _ResourceId
| top maxResultCount by Average desc
| parse tolower(_ResourceId) with * "resourcegroups/" resourceGroup "/providers/microsoft.compute/" typeVM "/" nameVM
| project Computer, resourceGroup, Average, P50th, P90th, P95th, Max, Type = typeVM, Name = nameVM

azureResourceGraph.query:
resources
| where tolower(type) contains "virtualmachines" and resourceGroup in~ ($rg) 
| project Name = tolower(name), tenantId, resourceGroup

panels.title: Memory Utilization Statistics

panels.description: Detailed disk space statistics per VM.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
let maxResultCount = 10;
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where Origin == 'vm.azm.ms' and (Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpaceMB')
| extend ComputerId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId)
| extend Tags = todynamic(Tags)
| extend Total = todouble(Tags['vm.azm.ms/diskSizeMB']), MountId = tostring(Tags['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| extend Val = (100.0 - (Val * 100.0)/Total)
| summarize Average = round(avg(Val), 2), Max = round(max(Val), 2), P50th = round(percentile(Val, 50), 2), P90th = round(percentile(Val, 90), 2), P95th = round(percentile(Val, 95), 2) by MountId, ComputerId, Computer, _ResourceId
| top maxResultCount by Average desc
| parse tolower(_ResourceId) with * "resourcegroups/" resourceGroup "/providers/microsoft.compute/" typeVM "/" nameVM
| project Computer, resourceGroup, MountId, Average, P50th, P90th, P95th, Max, Type = typeVM, Name = nameVM

azureResourceGraph.query:
resources
| where tolower(type) contains "virtualmachines" and resourceGroup in~ ($rg) 
| project Name = tolower(name), tenantId, resourceGroup

panels.title: Disk Space Statistics

panels.description: Detailed network receive statistics per VM.

azureLogAnalytics.query:
let startDateTime = $__timeFrom;
let endDateTime = $__timeTo;
let maxResultCount = 10;
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated between (startDateTime .. endDateTime)
| where Origin == 'vm.azm.ms' and (Namespace == 'Network' and Name == 'ReadBytesPerSecond')
| extend ComputerId = iff(isempty(_ResourceId), Computer, _ResourceId)
| summarize Average = round(avg(Val)/1024/1024, 3), Max = round(max(Val)/1024/1024, 3), P50th = round(percentile(Val, 50)/1024/1024, 3), P90th = round(percentile(Val, 90)/1024/1024, 3), P95th = round(percentile(Val, 95)/1024/1024, 3) by ComputerId, Computer, _ResourceId
| top maxResultCount by Average desc
| parse tolower(_ResourceId) with * "resourcegroups/" resourceGroup "/providers/microsoft.compute/" typeVM "/" nameVM
| project Computer, resourceGroup, Average, P50th, P90th, P95th, Max, Type = typeVM, Name = nameVM

azureResourceGraph.query:
resources
| where tolower(type) contains "virtualmachines" and resourceGroup in~ ($rg) 
| project Name = tolower(name), tenantId, resourceGroup

panels.title: Network Receive Statistics (MB/s)

panels.description: All Azure resources in the selected subscription.

azureResourceGraph.query:
Resources
| where subscriptionId == ${sub:singlequote}
| project
    ResourceName = name,
    ResourceType = type,
    ResourceGroup = resourceGroup,
    Region = location
| order by ResourceGroup asc

panels.title: All Monitored Resources

list.description: Categorizes resources groups using resource graph
list.name: category

azureResourceGraph.query:
resourcecontainers
| where type == "microsoft.resources/subscriptions/resourcegroups"
| extend rg = tolower(name)
| where
    ("$category" == "All") or
    ("$category" == "Prod" and rg matches regex @"(^|[-_])(prod|production)([-_]|$)") or
    ("$category" == "Client Facing" and rg matches regex @"(^|[-_])(dev|development|uat|qa|test|tst|stage|staging|prod|production)([-_]|$)") or
    ("$category" == "Nonclient Facing" and not(rg matches regex @"(^|[-_])(dev|development|uat|qa|test|tst|stage|staging|prod|production)([-_]|$)"))
| project name
| order by name asc

title: Client Overview Copy
